accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; CRA mechanism and EPA rule identification are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: The description of CRA process requiring presidential signature is accurate real-world context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as using CRA to overturn the EPA heavy-duty vehicle emissions rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately states the rule shall have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill.

effective_dates.why: Notes Senate passage on April 26, 2023 and no separate effective date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the CRA mechanism, targeted rule, and the nullification operative language.

correct_figures.why: 88 Fed. Reg. 4296, January 24, 2023, April 26, 2023 all correctly stated.
